SEARCH
Package controller

Class JBomberMan

java.lang.Object
controller.JBomberMan
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class JBomberMan extends Object implements Runnable
Main class for the controller that handle the game loop
Author:
Scarselli Ilaria, matricola 1918975

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    JBomberMan()
    Class constructor for the game where the main components are initialized

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    checkForPowerUp(int tileX, int tileY)
    Method to randomly place powerups in the map when some soft-walls are broken
    void
    contactMonster(int i)
    If the player touches a monster, it loses an heart life and triggers the knock-back animation
    void
    knockBack(Monster monster)
    Handles the beginning of the knock-back changing the player direction and speed and setting the knock-back flag to true.
    static void
    main(String[] args)
    main method that initializes the game and starts it
    void
    manageBombs()
    Method to manage the bombs placed by the player, their counters and their explosion
    void
    manageExplosion(List<Integer> indexes)
    Handles the beginning of a new explosion for all the bombs that are detonating.
    void
    manageMonsters()
    Method to manage the monsters' model-aspects
    void
    placeBomb()
    Method to place a new bomb, if the maximum number of bombs is not yet met and if the cooldown time from the last bomb is elapsed
    void
    playMusic(int i)
    Method to start playing the selected music
    void
    playSE(int i)
    Plays the selected Sound Effect
    void
    restart()
    Restarts all the configuration of the game if, after a game over, the player decides to quit to title screen
    void
    retry()
    Restarts just the level after a game over.
    void
    run()
    Run method of the gameThread.
    void

    Sets the starting position, direction and invincibility state.

    Sets the default values for the player's position, speed, direction and invincibility stat for the beginning of the game

    Sets the correct powerup with the asset setter

    Initializes the monster array with the assetSetter

    Update method for the game thread.

    Method to move the monster and check its collisions

    Updates the player's model and checks its collisions
    void
    updatePlayerKnockBack()
    Manages the player knock-back duration and collisions
    void

    Manages the updates to do while in play state: checks the bombs, moves the player, moves the monsters, checks the collisions

  • Constructor Details

    • JBomberMan

      public JBomberMan()
      Class constructor for the game where the main components are initialized

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      main method that initializes the game and starts it
      Parameters:
      args -

    • setPlayerDefaultValues

      public void setPlayerDefaultValues()
      Sets the default values for the player's position, speed, direction and invincibility stat for the beginning of the game

    • setDefaultPosition

      public void setDefaultPosition()
      Sets the starting position, direction and invincibility state. This method is used both at the beginning of the game and when the player looses three heart-lives

    • setupGame

      public static void setupGame()
      Initializes the monster array with the assetSetter

    • startGameThread

      public static void startGameThread(JBomberMan jbm)
      Method to start the game thread
      Parameters:
      jbm - the instance of this JBomberMan class for the game

    • run

      public void run()
      Run method of the gameThread. It calls the update methods FPS-times per second. After every update, it sleeps for the remaining time until the next one
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable

    • update

      public void update()
      Update method for the game thread. Updates and handles the main aspects of the game following the game logic

    • updatePlayState

      public void updatePlayState()
      Manages the updates to do while in play state: checks the bombs, moves the player, moves the monsters, checks the collisions

    • manageBombs

      public void manageBombs()
      Method to manage the bombs placed by the player, their counters and their explosion

    • updatePlayerKnockBack

      public void updatePlayerKnockBack()
      Manages the player knock-back duration and collisions

    • updatePlayer

      public void updatePlayer()
      Updates the player's model and checks its collisions

    • contactMonster

      public void contactMonster(int i)
      If the player touches a monster, it loses an heart life and triggers the knock-back animation

    • knockBack

      public void knockBack(Monster monster)
      Handles the beginning of the knock-back changing the player direction and speed and setting the knock-back flag to true.
      Parameters:
      monster - the monster object that caused the knock-back animation

    • manageMonsters

      public void manageMonsters()
      Method to manage the monsters' model-aspects

    • updateMonster

      public void updateMonster(int i)
      Method to move the monster and check its collisions
      Parameters:
      i -

    • checkForPowerUp

      public void checkForPowerUp(int tileX, int tileY)
      Method to randomly place powerups in the map when some soft-walls are broken
      Parameters:
      tileX - the x-coordinate of the tile for the powerup
      tileY - the y-coordinate of the tile for the powerup

    • setPowerup

      public void setPowerup(String name, int tileX, int tileY)
      Sets the correct powerup with the asset setter
      Parameters:
      name - the type of the powerup
      tileX - the x-coordinate of the tile for the powerup
      tileY - the y-coordinate of the tile for the powerup

    • retry

      public void retry()
      Restarts just the level after a game over. The score of the level is set to zero again

    • restart

      public void restart()
      Restarts all the configuration of the game if, after a game over, the player decides to quit to title screen

    • placeBomb

      public void placeBomb()
      Method to place a new bomb, if the maximum number of bombs is not yet met and if the cooldown time from the last bomb is elapsed

    • manageExplosion

      public void manageExplosion(List<Integer> indexes)
      Handles the beginning of a new explosion for all the bombs that are detonating. For each one of those bombs it creates a new Explosion object
      Parameters:
      indexes - the List with the indexes of all the bombs that are detonating

    • playMusic

      public void playMusic(int i)
      Method to start playing the selected music
      Parameters:
      i - the index for the music to play looped

    • stopMusic

      public void stopMusic()
      Stops the music

    • playSE

      public void playSE(int i)
      Plays the selected Sound Effect
      Parameters:
      i - the index for the sound effect to play
